summary: Completed comprehensive security and validation testing of Hidden Monkey Stays Guest Portal. Backend security validation is mostly working, but some vulnerabilities found. Frontend navigation is blocked due to backend integration issues.

critical_bugs.issue: SQL injection possible with specific payloads like 'admin'--' causing 500 internal server error
critical_bugs.impact: Potential database manipulation or service disruption

moderate_issues.issue: Input length validation allows very long strings (truncated but not rejected)
moderate_issues.impact: Potential DoS or data integrity issues

moderate_issues.issue: Some invalid phone formats not properly rejected

working_security_features: XSS prevention in guest_name field (422 validation error)
XSS prevention in message field (422 validation error)
NoSQL injection prevention in property_id field
Most phone number format validation working
API validation returns proper 422 errors for malicious input

critical_bugs.issue: Frontend navigation not working - all routes redirect to homepage
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot access check-in, requests, food ordering pages

critical_bugs.issue: External API gateway returns 404, backend not accessible from frontend
critical_bugs.impact: No backend functionality available to users

ui_bugs.issue: Check-in page at /:slug/checkin not loading form - shows homepage instead

design_issues.issue: Frontend displays 'Preview Only' mode message instead of functional interface
design_issues.impact: Users cannot complete any actions (check-in, orders, requests)

working_features: Homepage loading correctly with proper design
Module cards displayed with correct styling
No JavaScript errors or console errors

passed_tests: Admin authentication rejection with invalid password
XSS prevention in guest name field
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Fix SQL injection vulnerability causing 500 errors for payloads like 'admin'--'. 2. Fix input length validation to reject (not just truncate) very long inputs. 3. CRITICAL: Fix frontend routing and backend integration - external API gateway returning 404 prevents all user functionality. 4. Configure check-in form URL in property settings to enable check-in flow. 5. Investigate why frontend is stuck in 'preview only' mode.
